title: ProDec 4 piece Trade Professional Pointed Synthetic Sash Brush Set Ideal for Precise Painting of Sash Windows, Architraves and Other Curved, Moulded or Profiled Surfaces with Gloss and Satin Paints
features: 4 piece sash brush set ideal for detail work on sash windows, architraves and other moulded or profiled surfaces
High quality tapered synthetic filament for precise control and a professional finish
Slimline wooden handle enables you to turn the brush and maximise paint application
Suitable for all paint types and compatible with vapour boxes
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Synthetic sash brushes - a decorator's classic tool refined with modern technology Sash brushes are ideal for detail work on sash windows, window frames, architraves and other mouldings or profiled surfaces. They don’t splay out, something flat brushes can do, which gives you absolute precision as to exactly where the paint goes. They’re also great for general cutting in, giving neat, sharp lines with no need to break them in before they’re up to the task. Set in a rust-resistant, stainless steel ferrule, ProDec’s synthetic sash brushes are suited to water- and solvent/oil-based paints including emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), gloss and satin and feature high quality tapered synthetic filament, which is softer and smoother than traditional pure bristle. With excellent paint loading capacity and smooth release that regulates paint flow to the tip of the brush, they enable you to easily achieve a professional finish. The slimline wooden handle enables you to turn the brush during application, maximising the paint application and delivering longer strokes. It also features a hanging hole for storage, which is also a great way to dry the brush after washing and let gravity do the work, helping it maintain its shape ready for next use. Solutions for painting narrow and awkward spots from ProDec ProDec has a range of brushes available to help with those places that standard paint brushes can't go or aren't suited to. Sash brushes Ideal for detail work on sash windows, window frames, architraves and other mouldings or profiled surfaces. They don’t splay out, which gives you absolute precision as to exactly where the paint goes. Available in high quality synthetic bristle and pure white bristle options. Fitch brushes Ideal anywhere that precise paint application is required or access is tricky, including touching up paintwork, detail work around switches and sockets, tight or recessed corners, pipework and more. Gives sharp paint lines without the need for masking tape. Dogleg brushes Gives an extended reach of over twice that of a standard paint brush with the head set at 35 degrees, making it ideal for cutting in edges on high walls and ceilings or reaching awkward areas like behind radiators, gutters and pipes where hands struggle to get. Striker brushes A distinctive round head for high capacity paint holding, an angled head for optimum contact with the surface and a long handle that enables you to get to difficult to reach areas such as high walls and ceilings without having to resort to ladders or platforms, or awkward areas like behind radiators, gutters and pipes or staining fences behind shrubs and bushes.
